blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,606 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
